audit_items.proof_trace: The property's premise is false: exceptions thrown at L295 are caught inside sass_parse_block (sass_context.cpp:L199), not by the C API caller. sass_compile_context unconditionally calls sass_delete_compiler(compiler) at L323 (outside its own try-catch), which calls delete cpp_ctx → Context::~Context(). The destructor correctly handles the dual-ownership of the contents pointer (resources[idx].contents == import_stack.back()->source) by freeing via the resources loop first and then using sass_import_take_source to zero the import entry's pointer before sass_delete_import, preventing any double-free.
